ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for patient login */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the patient's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the patient's account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep_data" (
  "sleep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep data entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who owns the sleep data */,
  "sleep_date" TEXT /* Date of the sleep data */,
  "total_sleep_records" INTEGER /* Total number of sleep records for the patient */,
  "total_minutes_asleep" INTEGER /* Total minutes the patient was asleep */,
  "total_time_in_bed" INTEGER /* Total time the patient spent in bed */,
  "total_time_awake" INTEGER /* Total time the patient was awake */,
  "total_minutes_light" INTEGER /* Total minutes the patient spent in light sleep */,
  "total_minutes_deep" INTEGER /* Total minutes the patient spent in deep sleep */,
  "total_minutes_rem" INTEGER /* Total minutes the patient spent in REM sleep */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the sleep session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the sleep session */,
  "sleep_quality_score" REAL /* Sleep quality score */,
  "heart_rate_avg" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during sleep */,
  "blood_oxygen_level" REAL /* Average blood oxygen level during sleep */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sleep data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the sleep data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sleep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep stage */,
  "sleep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sleep data that the stage belongs to */,
  "stage_type" TEXT /* Type of sleep stage (e.g. light, deep, REM) */,
  "stage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the sleep stage in minutes */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the sleep stage */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the sleep stage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sleep stage data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the sleep stage data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_stages_sleep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sleep_id") REFERENCES sleep_data ("sleep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who owns the device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g. wearable, mobile app) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the device record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the device record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device data entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that the data belongs to */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the device data */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the patient */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken by the patient */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled by the patient */,
  "heart_rate_min" INTEGER /* Minimum heart rate recorded */,
  "heart_rate_max" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate recorded */,
  "blood_oxygen_min" REAL /* Minimum blood oxygen level recorded */,
  "blood_oxygen_max" REAL /* Maximum blood oxygen level recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the device data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the device data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who the recommendation is for */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the recommendation was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_professionals" (
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare professional */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the healthcare professional */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare professional */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the healthcare professional */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the healthcare professional */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Office address of the healthcare professional */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the healthcare professional's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the healthcare professional's account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hcp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_hcp" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare professional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "hcp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep goal */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who set the goal */,
  "goal_date" TEXT /* Date the goal was set */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of sleep goal (e.g. duration, quality) */,
  "goal_value" INTEGER /* Value of the sleep goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the goal was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the goal was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_goals_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep quality entry */,
  "sleep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sleep data that the quality entry belongs to */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Sleep quality score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sleep quality data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the sleep quality data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_quality_sleep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sleep_id") REFERENCES sleep_data ("sleep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_sleep_stage" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "stage_type" TEXT /* Type of sleep stage (e.g. light, deep, REM) */,
  "stage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the sleep stage in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "stage_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_device" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_sleep_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device sleep data entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that the data belongs to */,
  "sleep_date" TEXT /* Date of the sleep data */,
  "sleep_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of sleep in minutes */,
  "heart_rate_avg" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during sleep */,
  "blood_oxygen_avg" REAL /* Average blood oxygen level during sleep */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the device sleep data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the device sleep data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_sleep_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep_stage_durations" (
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep stage duration */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "stage_type" TEXT /* Type of sleep stage (e.g. light, deep, REM) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the sleep stage in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_stage_durations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep_quality_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep quality score */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "score" REAL /* Sleep quality score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_quality_scores_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who set the goal */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g. sleep duration, sleep quality) */,
  "goal_value" INTEGER /* Value of the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_goals_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hcp_patients" (
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare professional */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hcp_id", "patient_id")
)
